title: dryopteris parasitica
intro:
Dryopteris parasitica, also known as the parasitic fern, is a type of vascular plant that grows in a parasitic manner on the roots of other plants, typically trees, and obtains its nutrients through an underground connection.

This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antifungal properties, which can be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of D. parasitica include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and boost the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant include tea, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
